mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GATHER.TB_SFLOW_COLLECT ( COLLECT_SEQ, COLLECT_HOST, AGENT_ADDRESS, ETHER_TYPE, HEADER_PROTOCOL, INPUT_IFINDEX, OUTPUT_IFINDEX, SAMPLE_DIRECTION, SRC_IP, SRC_MAC, SRC_PORT, SOURCE_ID_TYPE, SOURCE_ID_INDEX, DST_IP, DST_MAC, DST_PORT, PACKET_BYTES, PACKET_DROPS, FRAME_LENGTH, HEADER_LENGTH, IP_DSCP, IP_ECN, IP_FLAGS, IP_FRAGMENT_OFFSET, IP_TOTAL_LENGTH, IP_TTL, SAMPLING_RATE, TCP_HEADER_LENGTH, TCP_URGENT_POINTER, TCP_WINDOW_SIZE, COLLECT_TIMESTAMP ) VALUES ( #{collectSeq}, #{collectHost}, #{agentAddress}, #{etherType}, #{headerProtocol}, #{inputIfindex}, #{outputIfindex}, #{sampleDirection}, #{srcIp}, #{srcMac}, #{srcPort}, #{sourceIdType}, #{sourceIdIndex}, #{dstIp}, #{dstMac}, #{dstPort}, #{packetBytes}, #{packetDrops}, #{frameLength}, #{headerLength}, #{ipDscp}, #{ipEcn}, #{ipFlags}, #{ipFragmentOffset}, #{ipTotalLength}, #{ipTtl}, #{samplingRate}, #{tcpHeaderLength}, #{tcpUrgentPointer}, #{tcpWindowSize}, #{collectTimestamp} )
